title: Converting Oracle data types to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud's Gemini AI tutor helps developers migrate Oracle databases to PostgreSQL by converting data types such as VARCHAR2, NUMBER, and DATE to their PostgreSQL equivalents while maintaining precision and internationalization support. The tool explains the conversion process to help developers deepen their PostgreSQL expertise.
